# Ladies First — Brand & Artist Playbook (sample)

## Brand voice
Ladies First speaks in a warm, encouraging, unhurried tone. We never use fear or
pressure. Every caption reads like advice from a trusted friend who happens to be
a tattoo artist.

## Who we serve
Our clients are women aged 24 to 45 booking their first or second fine-line
tattoo. Many are nervous about pain and permanence, so reassurance matters more
than hype.

## Visual style
The house style is delicate fine-line and floral blackwork. We favor botanical
motifs, single-needle detail, and negative space over dense color packing.

## Lead artist — Mara
Mara is our lead fine-line artist. She specializes in botanical linework and is
known for a gentle, patient chair-side manner that puts first-timers at ease.

## What we promise
Every piece includes one complimentary touch-up within six months. We never
upsell a larger design than the client asked for.

## Tone rules
Do write in lowercase, friendly, second person. Do not use exclamation stacks,
all-caps urgency, or countdown-timer language.
